Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: SEAD (Suppression of Enemy Air Defenses) loadouts are a special type of loadout intended for killing or suppressing enemy AA guns and SAM sites.
This loadout is available to select attack and EW aircraft and will almost always include Anti-Radar Missiles (ARM) in addition to cluster bombs or rockets.

As previously mentioned, ARMs require the enemy radar to be actively emitting to guide towards their target. Note: ARMs can be fired at ship radars to suppress their air defenses ahead of a wave of anti-ship missiles!
